---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature for Hermetic Alchemy
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Hermetic Alchemy.

## Use Case

Describe the use case or problem this feature would solve.

**Example:**
> "When working on large projects, I need to be able to pause and resume the alchemical transformation process so I can review intermediate results before continuing."

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail.

**Example:**
> "Add checkpoint support that saves the state after each agent phase (Nigredo, Citrinitas, etc.) and allows resuming from any checkpoint."

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Benefits

List the benefits this feature would provide:

- [ ] Improved user experience
- [ ] Better performance
- [ ] More flexibility
- [ ] Enhanced reliability
- [ ] Other: ___

## Potential Drawbacks

Describe any potential drawbacks or concerns.

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share them here.

## Examples

Provide examples of how this feature would be used:

```bash
# Example command
/transmute build my app --checkpoint

# Expected behavior
# - Save state after Nigredo
# - Pause for user review
# - Resume with /transmute --resume
```

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical (must-have)
- [ ] High (very important)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Related Issues

- Related to #___
- Blocks #___
- Blocked by #___

---

**Remember:** Check existing [Feature Requests](https://github.com/mikolaj92/hermetic-alchemy/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3Afeature-request) before submitting!

---

## Feature Categories

Select the category that best fits your request:

- [ ] **New Agent** - Add a new alchemical agent or modify existing one
- [ ] **Workflow** - Changes to the Magnum Opus workflow
- [ ] **Quality Gates** - New or improved quality checks
- [ ] **Feedback Loops** - Enhancements to fix/exploration loops
- [ ] **Configuration** - New configuration options
- [ ] **Documentation** - Documentation improvements
- [ ] **Integration** - Integration with other tools/services
- [ ] **Performance** - Performance improvements
- [ ] **UX** - User experience enhancements
- [ ] **Other** - Something else

---

Thank you for your contribution! ⚗️✨
